title: Flaky Ethiopian Injera Crumble
description: A bitter, flaky ethiopian dish featuring pita bread made with sous-vide and egg-free-friendly techniques for kids and adults alike.

ingredients.name: 1 sheet of injera pita bread
ingredients.notes: Can be replaced with gluten-free injera

ingredients.name: Vegetable oil or butter
ingredients.notes: For greasing the sous-vide bag and cooking surface

instructions: Lay out the injera pita bread on a clean, dry cutting board.
Gently grease both sides of the injera with vegetable oil or butter. Be careful not to break it into pieces while greasing.
Transfer the grease-side up onto your prepared sous-vide bag (make sure there are no air bubbles). Seal the bag and place it in a water bath at 140°F (60°C) for 1 hour.
Once done, carefully remove from the bag. Allow to cool slightly before slicing into thin strips using a sharp knife or mandoline slicer.
Serve immediately as a crumble or use leftover slices as you would with regular injera bread.
